summary: This is iteration 2 of the Define phase for the task "Add UI for Dashboard". The phase's steps (requirements-writer, clarifying-questions-writer, codebase-explorer, guide-alignment-critic) again produced only Markdown documentation artifacts under .pipeliner/ (requirements.md, open_questions.md, discovery_notes.md), including this iteration's update adding requirements R36-R50 for a dashboard human-in-the-loop answering flow. No application code, build output, or new tests were introduced by this phase. The app/lib/worker/db changes visible in the diff against main are pre-existing base-branch commits, not products of this Define phase. There is therefore nothing runnable for a test-critic to build or test: running the repository's existing suite would exercise unrelated pre-existing code and provide no signal about this phase's work, and per the safety rule it would touch the live orchestrating system's shared environment for no benefit. Returning not_applicable, consistent with iteration 1.
